evidence.q1: Sections numbered 1-15 consecutively; cross-reference in S.4 'this DPA, the master services agreement, order forms' resolves to external documents only.
evidence.q2: 'Personal Data', 'Processing', 'Personal Data Breach' defined in S.2 and used consistently thereafter.
evidence.q3: 'within 48 hours' (S.7), 'within 2 business days' (S.4, S.9), 'within 15 days' (S.10) — all definite commercial timeframes.
evidence.q4: No archaic terms; uses modern phrasing like 'entered into by and between', 'will', and 'including'.
evidence.q5: All sentences are grammatically sound and non-contradictory, e.g., 'Vendor will notify Customer within 48 hours after discovering a Personal Data Breach.'
evidence.q6: Consistent active-voice register with 'Vendor will...' throughout, e.g., S.4 'Vendor will process...', S.5 'Vendor will maintain...', S.7 'Vendor will notify...'.
